creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
The Piwik maintainer/release manager has a bad habbit of rerolling
releases. It happened with version 1.8.4 also - see ports/171685.

Just to be 100% sure I have reviewed the changes between the original
and the rerolled version of 1.9.1, and there are no malicious changes.

In other words, just update the distinfo file.

Regards,
Hans Nordhaug
